matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The Brazilian Forest Service LPF page explicitly identifies the specimen as Micropholis mensalis and captions this photograph Corte tangencial.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at original resolution. A clean tan longitudinal wood face occupies the image and exposes visible grain; no tree, leaves, bark-only area, furniture, generic scene, diagram, or microscopic slide.
matchedCandidate.creator: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro, Laboratório de Produtos Florestais (LPF/SFB)
